name: HWR_RESUME_VL
query: SELECT B.RESUME_ID, B.ORIGINAL_ID, B.SOURCE_ID, B.DOWNLOAD_DATE, B.RESUME_TEXT, B.RESUME, B.MIME_TYPE, B.RESUME_METADATA, B.CHECKSUM, X.GBL_PRFL_ID, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_RESUME B LEFT JOIN HWR_RESUME_GBL_PRFL_X X ON (B.RESUME_ID = X.RESUME_ID AND B.SOURCE_ID = X.SOURCE_ID)
